name: EasyCommerce Starter Pack
description: A curated set of sample data to populate your EasyCommerce store for testing and development.

datasets.label: 20 Sample Products
datasets.description: Mixed product types with prices, categories, and stock levels.

datasets.label: 10 Sample Customers
datasets.description: Realistic customer profiles with addresses and contact info.

datasets.label: 15 Sample Orders
datasets.description: Orders with various statuses and payment methods.

datasets.label: 5 Sample Coupons
datasets.description: Discount coupons of various types — fixed, percentage.

datasets.label: 30 Product Reviews
datasets.description: Realistic product reviews with ratings and comments.

datasets.label: 3 Tax Classes
datasets.description: Standard, reduced rate, and zero rate tax classes.
